title: rubus sellii
intro: Rubus sellii, also known as the Black Raspberry, is a type of edible fruit-bearing plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant contains anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer effects. The health benefits of Rubus sellii include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving cognitive function, and providing protection against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus sellii include jams, jellies, teas, and supplements, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
